nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: Lina's sunbird
nodes.summary: Lina's sunbird（Lina's sunbird，学名 Aethopyga linaraborae），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: We are pleased to name this new and beautiful sunbird after this remarkable person}} Its natural habitat is tropical moist montane forest above 1000m

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Tagubud in New Bataan, where it is mainly seen by birdwatchers, has faced considerable deforestation
